soccer.summary: Alejandro Garnacho is struggling to stand out at Chelsea - so can the £40m signing from Manchester United still realise his potential at Stamford Bridge?
soccer.title_en: What is going on with Garnacho?

soccer.title: Union Berlin 聘請歐洲頂級男子聯賽首位女性主帥
soccer.summary: Marie-Louise Eta becomes the first woman appointed to manage a men's team in one of Europe's top five leagues as she is named interim head coach of Bundesliga side Union Berlin.
soccer.title_zh: Union Berlin 聘請歐洲頂級男子聯賽首位女性主帥
soccer.title_en: Union Berlin appoint first female boss in Europe's top men's leagues

soccer.title: Man City 在擊敗 Chelsea 的比賽中展現強勢
soccer.summary: Manchester City put three goals past Chelsea in a 17-minute spell at Stamford Bridge, to close the gap on leaders Arsenal to six points with a game in hand in the Premier League.
soccer.title_zh: Man City 在擊敗 Chelsea 的比賽中展現強勢
soccer.title_en: Man City make statement in dominant win over Chelsea
